name: Ziya

skills.name: Sanctification (Ziya)
skills.description: When Ziya deals damage to a target and they are defeated within 4s, he gains EXP. When reaching level, he gains Sanctify, and increases his level cap to 25. Sanctify allows him to increase a teammate's level cap, and potentially earn EXP.

skills.name: Divine Seal
skills.description: Seals enemies within range, dealing magical damage while reducing their Movement Speed, Physical and Magical Defense for 3.5s. If the skill hits an enemy, he gains a Movement Speed boost.

skills.name: Divine Punishment
skills.description: Conjures a magic circle that deals 3 strikes of damage to nearby enemies. After a short delay, the magic circle explodes, dealing extra magical damage and launching enemies for 0.8s.

skills.name: Universal Law
skills.description: Unleashes 3 shockwaves to deal magical damage. Reaching level 15 increases the Ultimate's charging speed by 10% and grants a chance to allow him to move after initiating the charge.

tips: Ziya is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.3% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Mask of Agony → Boots of the Arcane → Scepter of Reverberation → Savant's Wrath → Insatiable Tome → Void Staff.
Run Saint for stats that match Ziya's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Divine Seal → Divine Punishment → Universal Law → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Ziya excels into Diaochan, Ying, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Biron, Charlotte, Yao without team peel.

Ziya is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.3% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Ziya.

faqs.question: Is Ziya good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Ziya is Tier A Mage with 51.3% win rate, 0.8% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Ziya build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Mask of Agony, Boots of the Arcane, Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, Insatiable Tome, Void Staff. Run Saint arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Ziya?
faqs.answer: Pick Biron, Charlotte, Yao into Ziya. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Ziya completes core items. Ziya struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Ziya counter?
faqs.answer: Ziya is strong into Diaochan, Ying, Zilong according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Ziya when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Ziya good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Ziya is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.3% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Ziya.

faqs.question: What lane should Ziya play?
faqs.answer: Ziya is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Ziya?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Saint arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Ziya or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Ziya vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Ziya has +0.3% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Ziya when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Ziya?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Mage picks unless targeting a one-trick.
